name: DoIP_TCPSend
title: DoIP_TCPSend
syntax: long DoIP_TCPSend(dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
description: Sends a DoIP PDU with valid layout on the open TCP connection.

parameters.name: protocolD
parameters.description: If given, this will replace the configured protocol version in the DoIP PDU.[0; 255]

return: Error code, e.g. connection not established yet.
